market_context:
Cohort size: 25 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £89.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 38.0%
Median photo count: 22

title_variants: Free Parking + Garden, 3‑BR Home Near Shops
Quiet Residential Retreat, Steps to Arena & Shops
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your cosy, spacious home in the heart of Middleton, just minutes from Manchester’s attractions. This entire‑home retreat offers three comfortable bedrooms, a sofa bed, and a clean bathroom plus a separate toilet, comfortably sleeping up to six guests. Step outside to a private front‑yard garden with free on‑street parking right at the door—perfect for families or groups travelling by car. Inside you’ll find a bright living area, a fully‑equipped kitchen with gas cooker, microwave, mini‑fridge and all essential cookware, and high‑speed Wi‑Fi for work or streaming. For peace of mind, the property is secured with exterior cameras, a smoke alarm and carbon‑monoxide detector. Enjoy quick access to local shops, pubs, Middleton Arena and Shopping Centre, and a short drive to Heaton Park and Manchester Golf Club. Essentials such as fresh linen, towels, hangers, iron and extra pillows are provided. Heating keeps you comfortable year‑round. Whether you’re here to explore Manchester or relax in a quiet residential street, this home offers a blend of convenience, safety and comfort for a memorable stay.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a front‑garden shot that shows the house entrance and the free parking space as the cover photo—outdoor and parking features are high‑value differentiators for travelers.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £146.07 (64% above the local median of £89) to a more competitive level; a 15‑20% cut can attract price‑sensitive guests and boost occupancy beyond the current 58.7%.
Replace the current lead image with a professional photo of the front garden and parking area to highlight free parking, a top‑value amenity that is currently under‑represented.
Add a tumble dryer (and consider AC) to the amenities list; these missing conveniences are frequently requested in the cohort and can increase perceived value and booking rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is £146, which is 64% higher than the local median of £89, yet your occupancy is only 58.7%—adjusting price and spotlighting free parking can quickly lift bookings.
